name: CDM (chemically defined medium), experimental formulation (PMC9040583)
description: CDM (chemically defined medium), experimental formulation — a defined medium extracted from López-López et al. (2022). Mapped to BiGG from the paper's stated composition.

provenance.citation: López-López et al. Interrogation of Essentiality in the Reconstructed Haemophilus influenzae Metabolic Network Identifies Lipid Metabolism Antimicrobial Targets: Preclinical Evaluation of a FabH β-Ketoacyl-ACP Synthase Inhibitor. mSystems (2022). DOI: 10.1128/msystems.01459-21. [PMC9040583]
provenance.notes: Extracted from the primary paper (snippet: 235 mL of CDM contains 191 mL of RPMI 1640..., 10 mL of uracil (2 mg/mL), 20 mL of inosine (20 mg/mL), 2 mL of NAD (1 mg/mL), 4 mL of hemin (1 mg/mL), and 2.35 mL of 1 M glucose (final concentration, ). Component names mapped to BiGG (see mapping_confidence); presence-based bounds unless the paper gave exchange bounds; concentration_mM where units allowed. Extraction confidence: high.
provenance.verification: auto-extracted from primary literature; formulation not manually verified
